name: Turn n8n form submissions into PDFs with TemplateFox

parameters.content:
## Turn n8n form submissions into PDFs with TemplateFox

No-code PDF generation from a simple web form. Users pick a document type, fill in details, and get a PDF generated and emailed to them.

### Who is this for?
Teams who need a quick internal tool to generate invoices, receipts, certificates, or packing slips without building a custom app.

### How it works
1. User fills out the built-in n8n form (invoice, receipt, certificate, or packing slip)
2. Code node maps the selected document type to a TemplateFox template ID
3. TemplateFox generates the PDF
4. PDF link is emailed to the recipient
5. Form shows a success confirmation

### How to set up (~5 min)
1. Install the **TemplateFox** community node from Settings → Community Nodes
2. Add your **TemplateFox API** credentials
3. Open the "Map Template & Build Data" code node and paste your template IDs
4. Update the sender email in the "Email PDF to Recipient" node
5. Activate and share the form URL with your team

### Requirements
- TemplateFox API key — [get one free at app.templatefox.com](https://app.templatefox.com)
- Gmail account with OAuth2

### How to customize
- Add or remove document types in the form dropdown and code node mapping
- Edit form fields to match your template variables
- Uses n8n's built-in Form Trigger — no external form tool needed

**Note:** This template uses the [TemplateFox community node](https://www.npmjs.com/package/n8n-nodes-templatefox). Install it from Settings → Community Nodes.

### 1. Form Input
Built-in n8n form with template picker, recipient info, and document details.

### 2. Map Template
Maps form selection to a TemplateFox template ID. Update the IDs here.

### 3. Generate PDF
TemplateFox generates the PDF using the mapped template and form data.

### 4. Email & Respond
Sends the PDF link via email and shows a success message on the form.

parameters.formDescription: Fill in the details below to generate your PDF document.

parameters.subject: =Your {{ $('Map Template & Build Data').item.json.templateName }} is ready
parameters.message:
=

Hi {{ $('Map Template & Build Data').item.json.recipientName }},

Your {{ $('Map Template & Build Data').item.json.templateName.toLowerCase() }} has been generated.

Download PDF

This link expires in 24 hours.

parameters.responseBody: =Your {{ $('Map Template & Build Data').item.json.templateName }} has been generated and sent to {{ $('Map Template & Build Data').item.json.recipientEmail }}!
